The '''Corellian Council''' was the government body ruling the planet [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] during the [[Cold War (Galactic Republic–Sith Empire)|Cold War]] and the [[Galactic War]]. This elected governing represented the planet's major population districts and was led by a [[Prime Minister/Legends|prime minister]], who was ultimately chosen by a Council vote.<ref name="TOR-CG" />

==History==
Although the Corellian population widely supported the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]],<ref name="TOR-TCR">{{TORcite|type=codex|The Corellian Rebellion}}</ref> the Council aligned itself with the [[Sith Empire (Post–Great Hyperspace War)|reconstituted Sith Empire]] during the [[Galactic War]]. In fact, the Sith had spend many years to recruit Corellian politicians in order to take control of the Council and eventually seize the planet.<ref name="TOR-IoC">{{TORcite|type=codex|Invasion of Corellia}}</ref> Through their treachery, the Councillors earned lifetime appointments to their posts.<ref name="TOR-CG" />

When the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] initiated a counterattack during the [[Battle of Corellia]] in [[3640 BBY]], Councilor Belos, who originally supported Corellia's defection, secretly aided the Republic up until their forces reached [[Capitol Square]]. The Council holed up in the Legislature with [[Darth Hadra]] of the [[Dark Council]] protecting them, providing information on the building's defenses to give the Empire an edge. After Hadra was [[Death/Legends|killed]] with the support of the Republic, [[Corellian Security Force|CorSec]] declared their right to arrest the Council for [[Treason/Legends|treason]]. The Council's arrest enabled the Republic to retake Corellia.<ref name="TOT:RtA">{{TORcite|type=faction|Republic|Right to Arms|Corellia}}</ref>
